sidebar:
  badge:

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-warning" aria-hidden="true"></span> `warning`

Avoid repeated map lookups. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
if _, ok := values[key]; ok { use(values[key]) }
```

## Good

```go
if value, ok := values[key]; ok { use(value) }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only inefficient-map-lookup`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
